_doc: Discrete Fourier Transform of a voltage waveform over a time window. The result is itself a waveform (frequency-domain); reference it from dft_mag_at_freq / dft_phase_at_freq to extract a scalar at a specific bin.
name: dft_window

params.doc: DFT-window-start var (DFT typically uses t_3..t_4, not the wider t_1..t_2).
Maestro window-function name (Rectangular | Hanning | Hamming | Blackman | …).
